/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,librovio_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o librovio_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/rovio_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/rovio_interfaces/srv/srv_reset_to_pose__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rovio_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/rovio_interfaces/msg/health__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hann/rovio_ws/build/rovio_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: librovio_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
